COMP5048 Assignment 1A MDS Notebook

Type_color <- function(type){
  if (type == 1){
    return ("red")
  }
  if (type == 2){
    return ("green")
  }
  if (type == 3){
    return ("orange")
  }
  if (type == 5){
    return ("blue")
  }
  if (type == 6){
    return ("pink")
  }
  if (type == 7){
    return ("purple")
  }
}
glass = read.csv("glass.csv")
glass_dist <- dist(glass[c(1:9)])
glass_mds <- cmdscale((glass_dist))

plot(glass_mds, col = glass$Type)

legend('topright',
       c("Type 1","Type 2","Type 3","Type 5","Type 6","Type 7"), pch=c(1,1,1,1,1,1), col = c("black", "red", "green", "cyan", "purple", "yellow"))
